testcase.name: test_ai_mode_with_enrichment_enabled_calls_preflight
testcase.failure: tests\runtime\test_mcp_enrichment.py:134: in test_ai_mode_with_enrichment_enabled_calls_preflight enrichment = build_mcp_enrichment( app\mcp_client\enrichment.py:62: in build_mcp_enrichment result = client.call_tool_strict(tool_name, {"session_id": session_id}, timeout_seconds=timeout_seconds) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'SuccessMockMCPClient' object has no attribute 'call_tool_strict'
